871 FEEL_TIRED_CD FEEL_TIRED_CD D0150D1 Mood: Feeling tired or having little energy: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has felt tired or had little energy. 0=No
1=Yes
9=No response effective 10/01/2023
